course_title: Practicum in Strength and Conditioning II-a
description:
Offered: Spring
The Practicum course is designed to expose students to the profession of strength and conditioning and to provide experience in supervising, coaching, and instructing athletes on specific protocols of exercise and fitness assessment. Students will be engaged in strength and conditioning activities within the Fitchburg State University Strength and Conditioning facility.
Prerequisite(s): EXSS 3011 and EXSS 3012
Note: EXSS majors only.
